title: Crispy Smoke Corn Delight
description: A kid-friendly Slovakian dish featuring sweetcorn, smoke flavor, and a touch of citrus to make it juicy and crispy, suitable for Jain followers.

ingredients.name: Citrus Zest
ingredients.notes: Lemon or orange zest, optional for added citrusy flavor

instructions: Preheat your oven and a skillet over medium heat.
Wash the sweetcorn well and remove any silk threads. Drain thoroughly.
Place the sweetcorn in the hot skillet and sauté for about 1 minute on each side, until it’s lightly browned but not charred.
In a small bowl, mix together vegetable oil and citrus zest (if using). Pour this mixture over the sweetcorn in the skillet. Cook for an additional minute to coat the corn evenly.
Transfer the corn from the skillet into a baking dish or tray lined with parchment paper.
Bake at 400°F (205°C) for about 15-20 minutes, shaking the pan halfway through cooking time, until it reaches your desired crispiness and golden brown color.
Once done, remove from heat and sprinkle a pinch of salt over each piece if you prefer. Serve immediately while hot.
